context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements UIKit child view controller containment APIs in the mandatory order for both adding and removing child view controllers, calls super in lifecycle overrides, uses viewDidLoad for one-time setup, and applies Auto Layout correctly with programmatic views.

checklist.name: addChild before addSubview
checklist.description: When adding a child VC, addChild(child) appears before child.view is added to the view hierarchy (addSubview or addArrangedSubview)

checklist.name: addSubview before didMove
checklist.description: When adding a child VC, the child's view is added to the superview before child.didMove(toParent: self) is called

checklist.name: willMove before removeFromSuperview
checklist.description: When removing a child VC, child.willMove(toParent: nil) is called before child.view.removeFromSuperview()

checklist.name: removeFromSuperview before removeFromParent
checklist.description: When removing a child VC, child.view.removeFromSuperview() is called before child.removeFromParent()

checklist.name: super in other lifecycle overrides
checklist.description: Any other lifecycle overrides (viewWillAppear, viewDidAppear, viewWillDisappear, etc.) call their respective super method

checklist.name: viewDidLoad for one-time setup
checklist.description: The child VC embedding setup (addChild, addSubview, constraints, didMove) is performed inside viewDidLoad, not in viewWillAppear or viewDidAppear

checklist.name: translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
checklist.description: child.view.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints is set to false for every child view controller's view before constraints are activated

checklist.name: NSLayoutConstraint.activate used
checklist.description: Constraints are activated using NSLayoutConstraint.activate([...]) — not using individual constraint.isActive = true calls
